archetypes.title: intake clerk
descriptions: A gray-sleeved clerk counts confiscated marvels without looking directly at them.
Three sharpened pencils and one private terror ride in the clerk's breast pocket.
wants: Make this intake look routine enough that no superior asks what escaped.
Find the missing docket before the objects it describes become somebody else's promotion.

archetypes.title: junior censor aide
descriptions: Charter-glass spectacles make the aide's blinking look geometric.
Red sealing wax stains two fingers; the third stain is not wax.
wants: Identify one containable truth about the sorcerer before the senior censor arrives.
Keep wonder measurable, especially the wonder currently breathing nearby.

archetypes.title: sealed-order courier
descriptions: A rain-dark satchel is chained to the courier's belt, while a second uniform is folded beneath the saddle blanket.
They keep checking the yard clock and the same unsealed route docket.
wants: Leave before the next audit discovers that one order in the satchel names the wrong household.
Find a plausible substitute to carry the northern packet through the wet road.

archetypes.title: confiscation porter
descriptions: Colored dust shines through every seam of the porter's regulation gray gloves.
A trolley key, a cage key, and somebody else's cell key hang from one overburdened ring.
wants: Move the singing crate off the public tally before it teaches the other evidence to answer.
Trade one dangerous key for a way out of the night shift.

archetypes.title: containment petitioner
descriptions: They clutch a numbered receipt for a family wonder the ledger insists never arrived.
Marble dust rims good traveling shoes; this is not their first day in the queue.
wants: Recover the harmless household spirit boxed somewhere in Evidence Yard.
Learn which clerk can correct a vanished docket without requiring another season of petitions.
